# Team rules
You need to follow a number of simple rules if you want to join our team
* Do not delete other people's repositories. The administrator can safely restore them but if you delete someone else's repository you will be reprimanded and then expelled from the team in case of repeated violations
* Do not edit othr people's repositories. If you want to correct something you should create fork and send pull request
* All private team repositories must be with unlicense license
* Meet the [requirements for the design of repositories](https://github.com/VooDoo-INC/.github/blob/main/profile/requirements-for-repositories/requirements.md)

## If you want to work with team projects
* You should talk about it with other people who works with repository
* You should write full-fledged comments in the code and when making changes to forks
* You should work with product *__ONLY__* in separate branch
* You should merge branches only after code review and coordination with the repository creator
